response.global_analysis: 1. Vocal Analysis: There is no spoken audio in this segment as the streamer, Ninomae Ina'nis, is muted while eating. Only background Minecraft chicken sounds and stream BGM are present. 2. Visual Events: Applied the on-screen text exception rule to transcribe and translate the prominent status overlay ('INA MUTED EATING RO TY' / 'INA MUTED EATING RQ TY'). 3. Translation/Interpretation: Interpreted 'RO TY' and 'RQ TY' contextually as typos for 'RB TY' (Right back, thank you) or 'Right quick, thank you'.
